tasks.subject: Task 1: pkg/weberr redirect helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Leaf package that mints a correlation ref and 302-redirects a browser to /error?error=<code>&ref=<id>.

**Files:** Create pkg/weberr/weberr.go + pkg/weberr/weberr_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/weberr/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/weberr/weberr.go","pkg/weberr/weberr_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/weberr/...","acceptanceCriteria":["NewRef returns 8 hex chars, varies","RedirectToError writes 302 Location /error?error&ref + Cache-Control no-store","stdlib-only imports"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Federation/invite/link handlers -> /error
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert federation login/callback, invite start-federation, identity-link begin/callback browser-facing writeAuthErr (JSON) to /error redirect + ref; preserve audit rows (stamped with ref); leave the federation-providers XHR list as JSON.

**Files:** Modify pkg/server/handle_auth.go (add redirectAuthErrToError), handle_federation.go, handle_invite_federation.go, handle_me_identities.go; Test handle_federation_error_redirect_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/server/ -run Federation

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/server/handle_auth.go","pkg/server/handle_federation.go","pkg/server/handle_invite_federation.go","pkg/server/handle_me_identities.go","pkg/server/handle_federation_error_redirect_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/server/ -run Federation","acceptanceCriteria":["fed login bad return_to -> 302 /error?error=invalid_return_to","fed callback upstream error -> 302 /error?error=upstream_error + audit ref","link callback upstream error -> 302 + audit ref","invite empty token -> 302 /error?error=invite_required","providers list endpoint unchanged JSON"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: OIDC authorize(pre-validation)+logout -> /error
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Convert OIDC authorize errors before a trusted redirect_uri and ALL logout errors from writeOIDCError (JSON) to /error redirect; preserve every post-validation redirectError-to-RP path.

**Files:** Modify pkg/protocol/oidc/errors.go (add redirectToErrorPage), authorize.go (pre-validation), logout.go; Test error_redirect_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/oidc/errors.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/authorize.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/logout.go","pkg/protocol/oidc/error_redirect_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/oidc/...","acceptanceCriteria":["unknown client -> 302 /error?error=invalid_request","bad redirect_uri -> 302 /error","post-validation errors STILL redirect to RP","invalid id_token_hint -> 302 /error","unregistered post_logout_redirect_uri -> 302 /error (not the URI)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: SAML SSO/IdP-init/SLO dead-ends -> /error
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace plaintext http.Error on SAML cannot-respond-to-SP dead-ends (parse, unknown/disabled SP, idp-init-disabled, replay, rate-limit, internal, raw-XML fallback) with /error redirect + mapped code + ref; PRESERVE all SP-binding responses (success auto-POST, passive/denied StatusCode, SLO responses, app-access-denied). Never redirect to untrusted ACS.

**Files:** Modify pkg/protocol/saml/saml.go (add errorPage), sso.go (ssoParseError sig + sites), sso_init.go, slo.go (sloParseError sig + sites); Test error_redirect_test.go

**Verify:** go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/...

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/protocol/saml/saml.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso.go","pkg/protocol/saml/sso_init.go","pkg/protocol/saml/slo.go","pkg/protocol/saml/error_redirect_test.go"],"verifyCommand":"go test ./pkg/protocol/saml/...","acceptanceCriteria":["malformed AuthnRequest -> 302 /error?error=saml_request_invalid","idp-init unknown sp -> saml_sp_unknown","idp-init disabled -> saml_idp_init_disabled","internal -> server_error","rate-limit -> rate_limited","SUCCESS still auto-POST HTML (regression)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: i18n new codes + UI copy (en + zh)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add friendly copy for new error codes (invalid_request/invalid_client/invalid_redirect_uri/saml_*) and UI strings (login.sessionExpired, error.reference, error.backToDashboard, sessionExpiry.*) to BOTH en.ts and zh.ts; keep parity/params/compile tests green; no curly apostrophe in en.ts.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/locales/en.ts, zh.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm run test -- locales

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/locales/en.ts","dashboard/src/locales/zh.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- locales","acceptanceCriteria":["8 new errors.* keys in both files","login.sessionExpired + error.reference + error.backToDashboard + sessionExpiry.* in both","parity/params/compile tests pass","no U+2019 in en.ts"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: API client 401 no_session seam
tasks.description:
**Goal:** lib/api.ts invokes a registerable handler on 401 with code==no_session, passing the method; call still rejects. Non-no_session 401 / 403 / 500 do not trigger it. upload() too.

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/lib/api.ts, api.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm run test -- api

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/lib/api.ts","dashboard/src/lib/api.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- api","acceptanceCriteria":["registerUnauthorizedHandler(fn|null)","401 no_session -> handler({method}) + still rejects","sudo_required/403/500 -> not called","upload triggers seam (PUT)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Session-expiry handler + composable + main.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Testable handler factory: no-op on public routes; authed GET -> clearAuth + router.replace(/login?return_to&reason=session_expired); authed mutation -> clearAuth + setExpiredFlag (no nav); idempotent. useSessionExpiry composable (shared flag). Wire in main.ts.

**Files:** Create dashboard/src/composables/useSessionExpiry.ts, lib/sessionExpiry.ts, lib/sessionExpiry.test.ts; Modify main.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm run test -- sessionExpiry

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/composables/useSessionExpiry.ts","dashboard/src/lib/sessionExpiry.ts","dashboard/src/lib/sessionExpiry.test.ts","dashboard/src/main.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- sessionExpiry","acceptanceCriteria":["public route -> no-op","authed GET -> clearAuth + replace login w/ return_to+reason","authed mutation -> flag, no nav","idempotent","useSessionExpiry shared ref + trigger/reset"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: SessionExpiredBanner global prompt
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Persistent non-dismissable top banner shown when the mutation expiry flag is set; 'Sign in again' -> router.push(/login?return_to=current&reason=session_expired) + reset flag. Mounted in App.vue.

**Files:** Create dashboard/src/components/custom/SessionExpiredBanner.vue + .test.ts; Modify App.vue

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm run test -- SessionExpiredBanner

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/components/custom/SessionExpiredBanner.vue","dashboard/src/components/custom/SessionExpiredBanner.test.ts","dashboard/src/App.vue"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- SessionExpiredBanner","acceptanceCriteria":["nothing when not expired","role=alert banner + button when expired","click -> push login w/ return_to+reason, reset flag","mounted once in App.vue"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: LoginView session-expired notice
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When ?reason=session_expired, LoginView shows a notice (login.sessionExpired); on mount calls useSessionExpiry().reset().

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/pages/LoginView.vue, LoginView.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm run test -- LoginView

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/LoginView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/LoginView.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- LoginView","acceptanceCriteria":["reason=session_expired -> notice renders","no reason -> no notice","onMounted resets the banner flag"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: ErrorView reference + auth-aware button
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ErrorView shows ?ref as 'Reference: <ref>'; return button is auth-aware (me set -> Back to dashboard /security; else -> Return to sign in /login).

**Files:** Modify dashboard/src/pages/ErrorView.vue; create/extend ErrorView.test.ts

**Verify:** cd dashboard && npm run test -- ErrorView

```json:metadata
{"files":["dashboard/src/pages/ErrorView.vue","dashboard/src/pages/ErrorView.test.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd dashboard && npm run test -- ErrorView","acceptanceCriteria":["?error=upstream_error&ref=abc -> message + Reference: abc","no ref -> no reference line","authed -> /security backToDashboard; else /login returnToLogin"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Smoke + runtime verify + gate + dist
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Smoke asserts federation-callback-error and SAML bad-request -> 302 /error. Runtime chromium verification of session-expiry redirect+notice, mutation banner, and a styled /error page. Full gate green; rebuild + commit pkg/webui/dist.

**Files:** Modify smoke script; rebuild pkg/webui/dist

**Verify:** smoke SMOKE_EXIT=0; go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./...; cd dashboard && npm run test && npx vue-tsc -b && node scripts/check-contrast.mjs

```json:metadata
{"files":["pkg/webui/dist"],"verifyCommand":"go build -tags nodynamic ./... && go test ./... && cd dashboard && npm run test && npx vue-tsc -b","acceptanceCriteria":["smoke: fed callback error -> 302 /error?error=upstream_error","smoke: malformed SAML -> 302 /error?error=saml_request_invalid","chromium: expiry -> /login + notice; mutation -> banner; /error styled not JSON","full gate green; dist rebuilt+committed"]}
```
